name: ArrayFill
javadoc:
/**
 * Fills and returns arrays in the fluent style.
 *
 * @since 3.14.0
 */

members.name: fill
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Fills and returns the given array, assigning the given {@code boolean} value to each element of the array.
 *
 * @param a   the array to be filled (may be null).
 * @param val the value to be stored in all elements of the array.
 * @return the given array.
 * @see Arrays#fill(boolean[],boolean)
 * @since 3.18.0
 */

tags.name: a
tags.content: the array to be filled (may be null).
tags.description: the array to be filled (may be null).

tags.name: val
tags.content: the value to be stored in all elements of the array.
tags.description: the value to be stored in all elements of the array.

tags.content: given array.
tags.description: the given array.

members.name: fill
members.javadoc:
/** * Fills and returns the given array, using the provided generator supplier to compute each element. Like * {@link Arrays#setAll(Object[], IntFunction)} with exception support. *

* If the generator supplier throws an exception, it is relayed to the caller and the array is left in an indeterminate * state. *

* * @param type of elements of the array. * @param array array to be initialized. * @param generator a function accepting an index and producing the desired value for that position. * @return the input array * @param The kind of thrown exception or error. * @throws E Thrown by the given {@code generator}. * @see Arrays#setAll(Object[], IntFunction) * @since 3.18.0 */

tags.name: <T>
tags.content: type of elements of the array.

tags.name: array
tags.content: array to be initialized.
tags.description: array to be initialized.

tags.name: generator
tags.content: a function accepting an index and producing the desired value for that position.
tags.description: a function accepting an index and producing the desired value for that position.

tags.content: input array
tags.description: the input array

tags.name: <E>
tags.content: The kind of thrown exception or error.

tags.name: E
tags.content: Thrown by the given {@code generator}.
tags.description: Thrown by the given generator.

tags.name: Arrays#setAll(Object[],
tags.content: IntFunction)

members.name: fill
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Fills and returns the given array, assigning the given {@code T} value to each element of the array.
 *
 * @param <T> the array type.
 * @param a   the array to be filled (may be null).
 * @param val the value to be stored in all elements of the array.
 * @return the given array.
 * @see Arrays#fill(Object[],Object)
 */

tags.name: <T>
tags.content: the array type.

tags.name: a
tags.content: the array to be filled (may be null).
